descriptive_rankings.ranking_basis: Historical replay rows ranked within equal lottery/window/main-number-budget buckets; the displayed rates are descriptive and include matched analytic random baselines.

disclaimer_zh: 本報告僅描述既有 replay 的歷史統計與隨機基準比較；不預測未來、不構成投注建議，也不表示任何策略可上線或可獲利。

metric_definitions.any_main_hit: at least one selected main number is in the actual main draw
metric_definitions.pick_k: first K distinct predicted main numbers ordered by bet_index then stored prediction order
metric_definitions.power_lotto_zone2: observed predicted second-zone hit rate compared with avg candidate count divided by 8

prize_aware_endpoint.BIG_LOTTO: main_hits >= 3 OR (main_hits >= 2 AND actual_special IN selected_numbers)

metric_definitions.random_baseline: analytic hypergeometric baseline matched to selected main-number and zone-2 candidate counts

source.db_open_mode: not opened; inherited replay statistics from committed P333 artifact

window_policy.window_selection: latest available target draws per strategy or common strategy intersection
